tasks.label: Git Status and Commit README
tasks.command:
git status && git add README.md && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation

- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization"

tasks.label: Commit README and gitignore
tasks.command:
git add README.md .gitignore && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation

- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization

Also updated .gitignore to allow committing documentation files"

tasks.label: Force commit README and gitignore
tasks.command:
git add -f README.md .gitignore && git commit -m "📚 Enhanced README.md with comprehensive documentation and updated .gitignore

✨ README.md enhancements:
- Added professional badges for all technologies
- Created detailed feature comparison table
- Enhanced quick start with multiple options
- Added comprehensive project structure overview
- Detailed VS Code integration documentation
- Performance benchmarking guidelines
- Troubleshooting section with common issues
- Customization and contribution guidelines
- Learning resources and acknowledgments
- Professional formatting and organization

🔧 Updated .gitignore to allow committing documentation files"
